Home.hero_sub: The loyalty, ecommerce, and AI platform powering the next generation of Latina-led fashion brands.
Home.trust_bar: Trusted by founder-led brands across Mexico, Colombia, and the U.S.
Home.problem_text: You sell on Instagram. Your link-in-bio leads to a site your cousin built on WooCommerce. You have no loyalty program, you don't capture emails, and every customer who buys once never comes back. You know you need 'something digital' but every quote sounds like Mandarin. They offer you sites without strategy, agencies without technology, and software without people. That's why we built Hilo.
Home.pillar_1_desc: Website + loyalty + AI + data on a single platform.
Home.pillar_2_desc: Tested on Fuxia before being sold to anyone else.
Home.pillar_3_desc: Agents working on WhatsApp, web, app, and back-office.
Home.fuxia_quote: "Hilo is what would have saved me three years of mistakes when I started Fuxia."
Home.cta_read_fuxia: Read the full Fuxia case study →
Home.final_cta_title: Ready to weave technology into your brand?

Loyalty.hero_h1: The loyalty, storefront & AI platform built for Latina-led fashion.
Loyalty.step_1_desc: Plug into WooCommerce, POS, and your existing data sources in minutes.
Loyalty.step_2_desc: Set your loyalty rules, brand colors, and train your AI agents.
Loyalty.step_3_desc: Launch your branded app and let AI handle support and styling.
Loyalty.features_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't.
Loyalty.feature_1_desc: Points, VIP tiers, and referral programs that actually make sense for fashion.
Loyalty.feature_2_desc: Productized WooCommerce templates optimized for conversion.
Loyalty.feature_3_desc: Embedded AI that recommends outfits based on past purchases and sizing.
Loyalty.feature_4_desc: One source of truth for all your customer data.
Loyalty.tier_starter_desc: For boutiques ready to capture data.
Loyalty.tier_growth_desc: For scaling brands that need an app.
Loyalty.tier_scale_desc: For established brands needing full AI.

AI.hero_h1: Seven AI agents working for your brand. 24/7.
AI.hero_sub: Not a bolted-on chatbot. Native AI integrated directly into your operations, sales, and support.
AI.agent_1_desc: Handles 90% of inbound WhatsApp and email inquiries instantly, sounding exactly like your brand.
AI.agent_2_desc: Recommends full outfits based on past purchases, increasing AOV and cart sizes.
AI.agent_2_stack: Gemini 1.5 Pro + Vertex AI Vector Search
AI.agent_3_desc: Generates thousands of product descriptions, ad variations, and social media captions.
AI.agent_4_desc: Predicts correct sizing through computer vision and historical data, reducing returns by 40%.
AI.agent_5_desc: Customers upload a photo and see how each garment fits on their real body. The agent analyzes silhouette and body type to suggest the most flattering pieces and cross-sell complementary items from the brand.
AI.agent_5_stack: Diffusion Try-On (IDM-VTON) + Pose & Body Segmentation + Gemini 1.5 Pro Vision
AI.agent_6_desc: Turns inbound WhatsApp leads into closed sales with no human intervention. Follows up via email and WhatsApp on a smart cadence; if the customer doesn't convert after several touches, it offers a discount within brand-defined limits and closes the sale digitally.
AI.agent_6_stack: Claude Sonnet 4.6 + Twilio (WhatsApp) + Resend (Email) + Cadence state machine
AI.agent_7_desc: Your AI co-founder that answers questions about your metrics in plain English.
AI.cta_final: Want this stack in your brand? → Book a demo

CaseStudiesIndex.hero_h1: Stories from brands woven with Hilo.
CaseStudiesIndex.hero_sub: How Latina-led fashion brands use Hilo Loyalty, Commerce, and AI Agents to grow without burning out.
CaseStudiesIndex.more_sub: We're shipping with new brands every month. Want to be the next case study?

CaseStudy.hero_h1: From local boutique to an AI-first empire.
CaseStudy.hero_sub: How Fuxia leveraged Hilo Loyalty and AI Agents to achieve a 30% MoM revenue growth.
CaseStudy.story_p1: Fuxia Ballerinas started as a beloved local brand with incredible product market fit but fragmented technology. Their customers loved the shoes, but getting them to buy a second or third time was a manual, expensive process reliant on Instagram algorithms.
CaseStudy.story_p2: By implementing HiloLabs, Fuxia launched a native iOS/Android application with an embedded Loyalty Engine and an AI Stylist powered by Gemini 1.5 Pro. Now, the brand doesn't wait for customers to come back; the AI brings them back.
CaseStudy.result_1: Automated 90% of sizing inquiries using Computer Vision.
CaseStudy.result_2: Increased repeat purchase rate from 15% to 68%.
CaseStudy.result_3: Achieved sustainable 30% MoM revenue growth without increasing ad spend.

About.hero_sub: We are not a digital agency. We are fashion founders who built the technology we desperately needed.
About.mission_desc: To equip Latina-led fashion brands with enterprise-grade AI and loyalty infrastructure, leveling the playing field against fast-fashion giants.
About.founder_desc: Founded by the team behind Fuxia Ballerinas. We've packed our operational playbook, marketing strategies, and AI agents into HiloLabs.

Commerce.hero_sub: High-converting, editorial WooCommerce storefronts engineered for fashion.
Commerce.feature_1_desc: Stop paying agencies for custom builds. We deploy ultra-fast, premium themes out of the box.
Commerce.feature_2_desc: Every storefront comes pre-wired with our AI Stylist and Computer Vision sizing tools.

Pricing.hero_sub: No hidden fees. Scale your tech stack as your brand grows.
Pricing.faq_1_q: Do I need to migrate off WooCommerce?
Pricing.faq_1_a: No, Hilo Loyalty and AI agents integrate directly into your existing WooCommerce store.
Pricing.faq_2_a: Yes, depending on the tier, a one-time onboarding fee applies to train your AI agents and configure the app.
